title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how agentic workflows across the SDLC can overcome the 40% productivity plateau of AI coding assistants. The talk covers agent systems for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and organizational structures needed to operationalize agents in production.
